payload.description: Safety & Security Committee Meeting 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, 8:30-9:00 AM ET
Minutes of the Safety Committee Meeting approved at April 2024 meeting

tool_args.label: C&D SMS Phase 2 rollout planned Q2 2024

payload.description: C&D Safety Management System Phase 2 materials rollout tentatively planned for Q2 of 2024

payload.claim_text: the subway system experienced a significant reduction in fires, decreasing by over 22% due to aggressive track cleaning by the Maintenance of Way cleaning team
the reportable customer injury rate decreased from 2.23 to 2.00 per one million customers compared to the prior 12 months

tool_args.label: MNR employee lost time injury rate decreased

payload.claim_text: The reportable employee lost time injury rate decreased from 2.23 to 1.80 per 200,000 working hours, compared to the prior 12 months

tool_args.label: NYCT subway customer accident rates decreased

payload.claim_text: Subway Customer Accident Rates decreased when comparing the most recent 12-month period to the previous one

tool_args.label: NYCT employee lost time accidents decreased

payload.claim_text: Employee Lost Time Accidents decreased when comparing the most recent 12-month period to the previous one

tool_args.label: B&T customer collisions continue to improve

payload.claim_text: The data shows that the customer collisions continue to improve. We are continuing to observe a considerable drop in the number of incidents while maintaining volumes consistent with pre-2020 average annual daily traffic (AADT) with around 900,000 daily crossings

tool_args.label: C&D Safety implemented Phase 1 of SMS

payload.claim_text: C&D Safety has implemented Phase 1 of the new three-phase, agency-wide Safety Management System (SMS)

tool_args.label: MTA published Safety Committee Meeting book
